name: AWS Certified Generative AI Developer – Professional

domains.name: Domain 1: Foundation Model Integration and Architecture
Domain 4: Security, Testing, and Governance for GenAI Applications

questions.text: An audit found gaps: the organization must invoke multiple FMs through unified APIs. Which option addresses this? invoke multiple FMs through unified APIs.

options.text: Imported models in Bedrock or SageMaker endpoints
Bedrock model IDs and inference profiles

questions.text: Which TWO practices align with the AWS Well-Architected Framework? (Select TWO.)

options.text: Design for failure and automate recovery
Use single-AZ for all production data stores
